etymology.description: 冋 (古 form of 冂 (jiōng, "closing") with 口 (kǒu, "mouth") inside)
etymology.interpretation: The character 冋 represents a closed area, symbolized by 冂 (jiōng, "closing") enclosing 口 (kǒu, "mouth"). This configuration suggests an enclosed space, aligning with its meaning of being closed off or surrounded.
